user.title: Solar Manager
user.description: Connect to your Solar Manager account. You can find your Smart Manager ID (SMID) in the solarmanager.ch web interface under Settings.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials or Smart Manager ID. Please double-check your username, password, and SMID.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Solar Manager cloud. Check your internet connection and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This Solar Manager gateway is already configured in Home Assistant.
